verdicts.corrected_value: Customer support helpdesk platform for ecommerce teams (tickets, customers, integrations, automation).
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Gorgias as a customer support helpdesk platform for ecommerce, confirming the recorded description.
The documentation explicitly states that private apps use API keys and public apps use OAuth2, confirming the recorded authentication methods.
The Help Center indicates that API keys can be created from the dashboard, confirming that users can self-serve to obtain keys.
The developer reference lists various endpoints, confirming that the API surface is REST.
The existence of public documentation and self-serve API keys confirms that integrations can be built today.
